commands.name: mise-list-all-tools
commands.title: Mise: List All Tools
commands.subtitle: List all tools in the Mise toolchain
commands.description: List all tools in the Mise toolchain

commands.name: mise-show-env-vars
commands.title: Mise: Show Environment Variables
commands.subtitle: Environment variables exported by mise
commands.description: Show the environment variables mise exports for the current shell

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
